Giovanni Antonio da Pordenone

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Man Entwined by Two Snakes
by Giovanni Antonio da Pordenone
Italy, 16th century · c. 1527 · pen and brown ink and brown and blue wash, heightened with white gouache
←Circle of Giovanni Antonio de'Sacchis, called Il Pordenone José Guadalupe Posada→
